query_normalized: agentic environment engineering for large language models: a survey of environment modeling, synthesis, evaluation, and application linguistics
rationale: The paper studies a key variable (token consumption/efficiency) of LLM behavior and proposes a prompt‑optimization method, which is directly relevant to engineering the environment (prompt design) for agentic LLMs—meeting criterion (b) (independent/dependent variable on the same domain) and also providing a methodological contribution to environment synthesis.
